name: Alex Turner
description:
This guy is really polite, watch the V Fest interview from 2008 or 2007, when the interviewer says 'you want to talk about gays?' and he says 'no 'g-a-z-e' and then he says 'you can't call them like that' very awkward, but it's very cute, Anyway, I love you Alex turnip

Bro why does he write in capital letters?
